title: Recursive QAOA: Correlation-Based Variable Elimination
description: Master Recursive QAOA (RQAOA), an enhanced variational algorithm that iteratively eliminates variables based on correlation measurements. Learn to implement, analyze, and apply RQAOA to challenging optimization problems.
learningObjectives: Understand the motivation and theory behind Recursive QAOA
Implement correlation measurement from QAOA output states
Apply variable elimination based on correlation analysis
Perform graph reduction while preserving problem structure
Implement complete RQAOA with backtracking for solution reconstruction
Compare RQAOA performance against standard QAOA
